testcase.name: test

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element
  • ...
    • is not clickable at point (604, 586). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.110) Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [892c713b45b701d885feb972e6c5ed8f, clickElement {id=f.96F54F06DDB3092C3D3135B67B7F3DC7.d.68BD458C30567AC17E138253FC049B60.e.1249}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 144.0.7559.110, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 144.0.7559.109 (6a8d5e49388..., userDataDir: C:\WINDOWS\SystemTemp\scope...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51964}, goog:processID: 19408, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51964/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 144.0.7559.110, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (892c713b45b701d885feb972e6c5ed8f)] -> xpath: //li[@class='ng-scope']] Session ID: 892c713b45b701d885feb972e6c5ed8f
